title: Let us know if an employee has left your employment :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Let us know if an employee has left your employment
If a worker from overseas has a visa that specifies employment with your business and leaves that employment, you can inform us about it.
A person who holds a visa to work for a specific business may be in breach of their visa conditions by remaining in New Zealand after that employment has ended.

## If you are an accredited employer
If you are an , there are some situations where you must tell us when a migrant worker leaves your employment. For more information about this:
If things change for AEWV accredited employers

## If you are not an accredited employer
If you are not an accredited employer, you must let us know if the worker has left your employment before their visa expires.
If you are not an accredited employer, you can email us with the employee's:
- date and circumstances of the termination of employment contract
- other identifying information and information about their visa status.
INZ.ComplianceInvestigations@mbie.govt.nz
